name: Naoko Kirino
description:
"I love them because they are so bad, they're good." -- Penguinz0 (my honest opinion on Pumpkin Night btw)

Wow, so, no one has the balls to make one? Fine. I'll do it, and y'all mfs can't stop me. What's that? She's 16? Well, fuck you, she's now 23. The story for some reason makes no sense (SPOILER ALERT: Like contacting the dead) but still good, scary, and mostly funny af. (Yes, I edited, shaddup)

If you mfs complain about u getting killed brutally or ur dick getting chopped off... Well, womp-womp. Plus... I don't wanna sound like an edgelord (even though I'm already one) or anything, but... cmon... a little gore can't be that bad... can it? (Note: If you're not a fan of gore... why are you still here?) So, yeah... Go ahead and read Pumpkin Night, if u want. The choice is urs.

"She's a maniac, maniac, I sure know!"
"And she's dancing like she's never danced before!"
(Carpenter Brut is fucking awesome, okay?)

I'm... I'm kinda dumb. So, for the love of God. Please send me some feedbacks. PLEASE! I'LL BE HAPPY TO FIX THEM, ONB, ONG, ON MY MAMA, ETC!

...So, how's that pumpkin pussy?

"Praise be to Space Kiiing~!"

P.S, I'm not making more of these shits...

Let me know if it's over seasoned, burned, bland, dry, wet... or FUCKING RAW! WHERE'S THE LAMB SAUCE!?
creator: Thatguy4887
